---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or command for PIA
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working. Include command protocol format, wire-format structs, or pseudocode if helpful.

## Command Protocol (if applicable)

If proposing a new command, describe the wire format:

- **Command type byte:** `0xNN`
- **Request payload:** (describe fields and types)
- **Response payload:** (describe fields and types)

## Platform/Architecture Scope

Which platforms or architectures does this apply to?

- [ ] All platforms
- [ ] Windows
- [ ] Linux
- [ ] macOS / iOS
- [ ] FreeBSD
- [ ] Solaris
- [ ] UEFI
- [ ] Android
- [ ] Specific architecture(s):

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative approaches you've considered and why they were not chosen.

## Additional Context

Any other context, references, or specification links relevant to the feature.
